title: Directive independent verification (v1)
description: Independent per-requirement verdicts (clean-context review). Authored by an INDEPENDENT verifier whose identity MUST differ from the producer of requirements.json (D-001-R028/R107). accept() reads this file as BLOCKING EVIDENCE (an in-regime task is refused unless every applicable requirement is PASS at the reviewed content identity, owner correction 1); acceptance AUTHORITY and all state transitions remain in tools/project_control.py -- this is evidence the CLI consumes, not a second gate/competing authority. The requirement id set here must equal the id set in requirements.json (no missing/extra rows).
